title: The Mercedes EQS returns with massive range and charging gains
summary: Mercedes-Benz is reintroducing its EQS electric sedan to the US market after a pause due to weak luxury EV demand and changes to federal incentives, now featuring improved range and charging capabilities.
content:
A year ago, Mercedes-Benz did the prudent thing and paused its EQ lineup of electric vehicles in the US. With customer demand drying up for luxury EVs, and federal incentives getting axed by vengeful Republicans, Mercedes put its first-generation EVs on ice.
But then, in January, Mercedes quietly reintroduced the EQS brand in the US, with The Drive declaring that the "blobs are back" - a reference to the sedan's much-maligned jelly-bean shape that prioritized aerodynamics over a more traditional profile. But we didn't yet realize how back the EQS truly was.
Today, Mercedes is reintroducing its electric sedan to a wary, cash-strapped market …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 梅赛德斯-奔驰EQS回归，续航和充电性能显著提升
zh.summary: 梅赛德斯-奔驰在因豪华电动车需求疲软和联邦激励措施调整而暂停后，重新在美国市场推出EQS电动轿车，现在具备改进的续航里程和充电功能。

title: Retro Rewind re-creates the glorious drudgery of working a '90s video store
summary: Retro Rewind is a nostalgic throwback game recreating the experience of working in a 1990s video store, offering repetitive charm despite limited complexity.
content: What the nostalgic throwback lacks in complexity it makes up for in repetitive charm.

zh.title: Retro Rewind重现90年代视频店工作的"荣耀乏味"
zh.summary: Retro Rewind是一款怀旧游戏，重现在1990年代视频出租店工作的体验，尽管游戏复杂度有限，但具有重复作业的魅力。

title: Measles takes a plane to Idaho, which has worst vaccination rate in US
summary: Measles has been detected in Idaho, which has the lowest vaccination rate in the US with only 78.5% of kindergartners vaccinated against measles in the 2024-2025 school year.
content: In the 2024-2025 school year, only 78.5% of kindergartners had measles vaccination.

zh.title: 麻疹飞往爱达荷州，该州疫苗接种率为美国最低
zh.summary: 爱达荷州检测出麻疹病例，该州的疫苗接种率为美国最低，2024-2025学年仅78.5%的幼儿园儿童接种了麻疹疫苗。

title: Justin Bieber’s YouTube Coachella set had nothing to do with who owns his music
summary: Justin Bieber played YouTube videos of his older songs directly from a Mac laptop during his $10 million Coachella headlining set, a technical choice unrelated to music ownership disputes.
content:
This past Saturday at the Coachella music festival, Justin Bieber played the first of two headlining sets in a deal reportedly worth $10 million. It was his most significant solo performance in years. But Bieber spent some of his time on stage the way many of us do on Saturday nights: on YouTube. For some of the set, Bieber played parts of his older songs right off YouTube from a Mac laptop. Behind him, on the stage's screen, you could see YouTube's website as he searched for songs in real time and then put the videos on full-screen while he sang along on stage. 
"I'm sorry to cut it, but these are little snippets. I just want to see how fa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 贾斯汀·比伯的YouTube Coachella表演与谁拥有他的音乐无关
zh.summary: 贾斯汀·比伯在他1000万美元的Coachella压轴表演中直接从Mac笔记本电脑播放他旧歌曲的YouTube视频，这是一个与音乐所有权争议无关的技术选择。

title: Google shoehorned Rust into Pixel 10 modem to make legacy code safer
summary: Google has integrated Rust programming language into the Pixel 10 modem to improve the safety of complex legacy code in cellular modems.
content: Cellular modems are complex black boxes of legacy code, but Google is making them safer with Rust.

zh.title: 谷歌将Rust集成到Pixel 10调制解调器中以提高遗留代码的安全性
zh.summary: 谷歌已将Rust编程语言集成到Pixel 10调制解调器中，以提高蜂窝调制解调器中复杂遗留代码的安全性。

title: Uber and Nuro begin testing premium robotaxi service in San Francisco
summary: Uber and autonomous vehicle company Nuro have begun testing a premium robotaxi service in San Francisco using Lucid vehicles, with Uber employees able to hail rides during the pilot program.
content: Uber employees can now hail a Lucid robotaxi as part of the testing.

zh.title: Uber和Nuro开始在旧金山测试高端机器人出租车服务

title: Microsoft is officially killing its Outlook Lite app next month
summary: Microsoft is discontinuing its Outlook Lite app next month, which was launched in 2022 as a lightweight alternative for Android devices with limited storage and slower internet connections.
content: Launched in 2022, Outlook Lite is a lightweight version of the regular Outlook app, designed for Android phones with limited storage and regions with slower internet connections. The app had already been scheduled for retirement.

zh.title: 微软将在下个月正式停用其Outlook Lite应用
zh.summary: 微软将在下个月停用其Outlook Lite应用，该应用于2022年推出，为存储空间有限和网络连接较慢的Android设备提供轻量级替代方案。

title: NZXT agrees to let customers keep their rental PCs in class-action settlement
summary: NZXT has agreed to let customers keep their rental PCs in a class-action settlement over its Flex program, forgiving up to $5,000 in debt per customer.
content: NZXT will forgive up to $5,000 in debt for customers of the Flex program.

zh.title: NZXT同意在集体诉讼和解中让客户保留租赁的电脑

title: RAMageddon has come for Microsoft’s Surface Pro and Surface Laptop
summary: Microsoft has raised prices on its Surface Pro 11 and Surface Laptop 7 from $999 to $1,499, citing global RAM shortages as the Surface lineup undergoes significant price adjustments.
content:
Microsoft just raised the prices across its line of Surface devices amid the global RAM shortage. Now, the 13-inch Surface Pro 11 and the 13.8-inch Surface Laptop 7 cost $500 more than their original starting price, going from $999 to $1,499, as reported earlier by Windows Central.
Last year, Microsoft stopped selling the  $999 versions of the Surface Pro 11 and the 13.8-inch Surface Laptop 7 in favor of the $1,199 models with more storage. At the time, it seemed like Microsoft was trying to make room for the cheaper 12-inch Surface Pro and 13-inch Surface Laptop that launched last May. However, these newer devices aren't safe from the pric …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软Surface Pro和Surface Laptop面临"RAM灾难"
zh.summary: 微软将Surface Pro 11和Surface Laptop 7的价格从999美元提高到1499美元，原因是全球RAM短缺导致Surface产品线价格大幅调整。

title: Thousands of rare concert recordings are landing on the Internet Archive — listen now
summary: Over 10,000 rare concert recordings spanning from the 1980s to present, meticulously collected by Chicago-based music enthusiast Aadam Jacobs, are now available on the Internet Archive.
content: Chicago-based music superfan Aadam Jacobs has been recording the concerts he goes to since the 1980s, amassing an archive of over 10,000 tapes.

title: NZXT to pay $3.45 million settlement over Flex PC rentals
summary: NZXT and its partner Fragile have agreed to pay $3.45 million to settle a class-action lawsuit alleging fraud through deceptive marketing and aggressive debt collection in their Flex PC rental service, affecting 19,322 customers.
content:
The Flex PC rental service didn’t make it clear to customers that it wasn’t a “rent-to-own” program. | Image: NZXT	

NZXT and its business partner Fragile have agreed to pay $3.45 million to settle a class-action lawsuit that accused the companies of attempting to "scam" consumers through their Flex PC rental service. The preliminary settlement was filed in a California District Court on April 7th to close a civil RICO case against the Flex program over allegations that it defrauded 19,322 customers through deceptive marketing practices and aggressive debt collection.
The settlement was shared on YouTube by Gamers Nexus, with host Steve Burke noting that NZXT and Fragile are still offering PC rental programs under the new agreement. This follows Gamers Ne …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: NZXT因Flex PC租赁服务同意支付345万美元和解金
zh.summary: NZXT及其合作伙伴Fragile同意支付345万美元，以解决一项集体诉讼，该诉讼指控其Flex PC租赁服务通过欺骗性营销和激进的债务催收构成欺诈，影响了19,322名客户。

title: Your tech support company runs scams. Stop—or disguise with more fraud?
summary: A critical examination of tech support companies reveals widespread scams, raising questions about whether fraudulent operations should cease or attempt to disguise their practices with additional fraud.
content: Fake it till you make it.

zh.title: 您的技术支持公司运营诈骗。停止还是用更多欺诈来掩盖？
zh.summary: 对技术支持公司的深入批评揭示了普遍的诈骗现象，引发了人们对欺诈性运营是否应该停止或试图用更多欺诈来掩盖其做法的疑问。

title: Xbox Game Pass ‘has become too expensive,’ says Microsoft’s new gaming chief in leaked memo
summary: Microsoft's new Xbox chief acknowledges Game Pass has become too expensive and signals pricing changes are coming. The company plans to evolve Game Pass into a more flexible system while maintaining it as central to Xbox's value proposition. This indicates major shifts in Microsoft's subscription strategy.
content:
Asha Sharma. | Image: The Verge, Microsoft	

Microsoft's new Xbox chief, Asha Sharma, has signaled that Xbox Game Pass pricing is about to change. In an internal memo to Xbox employees, obtained by The Verge, Sharma admits that "Game Pass has become too expensive for players" and that Microsoft needs "a better value equation."
"Game Pass is central to gaming value on Xbox. It's also clear that the current model isn't the final one," says Sharma. "Short term, Game Pass has become too expensive for players, so we need a better value equation. Long term, we will evolve Game Pass into a more flexible system which will take time to test and learn around."
Microsoft hiked the price of Xbox …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox Game Pass 变得'太贵了'，微软新任游戏主管在泄露备忘录中表示
zh.summary: 微软新任Xbox主管承认Game Pass变得太贵，并暗示价格调整即将推出。该公司计划将Game Pass发展成更灵活的系统，同时维持其作为Xbox核心价值主张的地位。这表明微软的订阅策略将发生重大转变。

title: You can make a multicolor MacBook Neo out of Apple’s spare parts
summary: Apple doesn't restrict the colors of MacBook Neo spare parts, allowing users to customize keyboards, cases, and other components in mismatched colors. Parts range from $34 to $175 each on top of the $599 base price, offering unexpected customization options for those willing to pay.
content:
If you're having trouble deciding on a color for a new MacBook Neo, you might not have to choose just one. The folks over at MacWorld found that Apple doesn't appear to limit the colors of spare parts you can buy for your Neo, potentially allowing you to deck out your indigo laptop with pink-tinted keyboard caps or a citrus green bottom cover.
You'll have to pay for these spare parts on top of the Neo's $599 starting price, though. While the bottom case costs $34.32, the keyboard caps are $39, and the top case is $175.12. A replacement for the entire keyboard is priced at $139.92 (with a $29.40 return credit). The MacBook Neo and its spare  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 使用苹果备件可以组装多色MacBook Neo
zh.summary: 苹果不限制MacBook Neo备件的颜色，允许用户自定义键盘、外壳和其他组件的搭配颜色。备件价格从34美元到175美元不等，这是599美元基础价格之外的额外费用，为那些愿意付费的用户提供了意想不到的定制选项。

title: Booking.com confirms hackers accessed customers’ data
summary: Booking.com confirmed a security breach exposing customer personal data including names, emails, physical addresses, and phone numbers. The company notified affected customers of the incident. This marks another major travel industry data breach compromising customer PII.
content: The travel giant notified customers that their personal data, including names, emails, physical addresses, and phone numbers may have been accessed in a security incident.

zh.title: Booking.com证实黑客获取了客户数据
zh.summary: Booking.com确认发生了安全漏洞，客户个人数据被泄露，包括姓名、电子邮件、实际地址和电话号码。该公司已通知受影响的客户。这是旅游业另一起重大数据泄露事件，危及客户的个人信息。

title: Read OpenAI’s latest internal memo about beating the competition — including Anthropic
summary: OpenAI's chief revenue officer sent an internal memo emphasizing the need to lock in users and build competitive moats against rivals including Anthropic. The memo highlights the ease with which users switch between AI models and stresses enterprise business growth. This reveals OpenAI's competitive strategy and market concerns.
content:
OpenAI released a report breaking down how people use ChatGPT and who they are. | Image: The Verge	

OpenAI's chief revenue officer, Denise Dresser, sent a four-page memo to employees on Sunday about the company's strategic direction, emphasizing the need to lock in users and grow its enterprise business. 
The memo, which was viewed by The Verge, repeatedly underlines the importance of building a moat around its AI products, to combat how easy it is for users to switch between whichever model is topping the charts on any given day or week. Dresser, who recently took over much of former COO Brad Lightcap's duties as he transitions to a new role focused on special projects, also emphasizes the importance of focusing on enterprise clients. It …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 阅读OpenAI最新的内部备忘录：关于击败竞争对手——包括Anthropic
zh.summary: OpenAI首席收入官发送了一份内部备忘录，强调需要锁定用户并建立竞争壁垒以对抗包括Anthropic在内的竞争对手。该备忘录突出了用户在AI模型之间切换的容易程度，并强调企业业务增长。这揭示了OpenAI的竞争战略和市场担忧。

title: Slate raises $650 million to make its budget electric truck
summary: Bezos-backed Slate Auto raised $650 million in Series C funding to develop an affordable electric pickup truck priced starting in the mid-$20,000s. The round was led by prominent investors including Dodgers owner Mark Walter. This funding accelerates the company's path to production later this year.
content:
Slate Auto, the EV startup backed by Jeff Bezos, raised $650 million to fund its effort to build an affordable electric pickup truck expected to start in the mid-$20,000s. The company plans on delivering its first EV later this year. 
The Series C round was led by TWG Global, headed by Guggenheim Partners founder and LA Dodgers owner Mark Walter and financier Thomas Tull. Slate didn't disclose its latest investors, but both Walter and Tull were investors in Re:Build Manufacturing, a Bezos-owned company from which Slate spun off last year. The company also didn't disclose its latest valuation, but was at $1.2 billion as of January 2025, acco …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Slate为其预算电动皮卡筹集6.5亿美元
zh.summary: 由贝佐斯支持的Slate Auto在C轮融资中筹集了6.5亿美元，用于开发起价在2万美元中段的经济型电动皮卡。该轮融资由包括道奇队老板马克·沃尔特在内的知名投资者领导。这笔资金加快了该公司今年晚些时候的生产计划。

title: Microsoft is testing OpenClaw-like AI bots for Copilot
summary: Microsoft is testing OpenClaw-style AI agent capabilities for its Copilot assistant to enable autonomous task completion in Microsoft 365. The company is exploring integration of the open-source platform into enterprise applications. This reflects Microsoft's push for more autonomous and productive AI assistants.
content:
Microsoft is looking into ways it can integrate OpenClaw-style features into its Copilot AI assistant, according to a report from The Information. The test reportedly comes as part of efforts to make Microsoft 365 Copilot "run autonomously around the clock" while completing tasks on behalf of users.
Omar Shahine, Microsoft's corporate vice president, confirmed to The Information that the company is "exploring the potential of technologies like OpenClaw in an enterprise context."  OpenClaw is an open-source platform that allows users to create AI-powered agents that run locally on a user's device. The platform rose in popularity earlier this …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Microsoft正在为Copilot测试OpenClaw类型的AI机器人
zh.summary: Microsoft正在为其Copilot助手测试OpenClaw风格的AI代理功能，以在Microsoft 365中实现自主任务完成。该公司正在探索将开源平台整合到企业应用中。这反映了Microsoft对更加自主和高效的AI助手的推动。

title: Google’s Pixel 10A is a good midrange phone that’s $50 off
summary: Google's Pixel 10A midrange phone is now $50 off at major retailers, dropping to $449 for the 128GB model. The phone features similar hardware to last year's 9A but includes exclusive AI features like Camera Coach and Auto Best Take. This is the first significant discount since the phone's March launch.
content:
If it’s time for you to upgrade your phone, it’s worth considering the Pixel 10A, Google’s latest midrange phone that has some (but not all) of the new software features of the pricier $599 Pixel 10. Every color of the 128GB 10A — including the alluring “berry” tone — is down to $449 ($50 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and the Google Store, where you can get it for even less with an eligible trade-in. This is the first cash discount we’ve seen since the phone’s launch in early March. The 256GB version is $50 off, too, selling for $549 at Amazon and Best Buy.
Google Pixel 10A

Where to Buy:

 $499 $449 at Amazon (128GB)
 $499 $449 at Best Buy (128GB)
 $599 $549 at Amazon (256GB)

If you look at our coverage of the Pixel 10A, it won’t take you long to put the pieces together and see that we feel Google played it safe with this year’s model. It’s strikingly similar to last year’s Pixel 9A — both feature a Tensor G4 processor, plus a camera combo consisting of a 48-megapixel main shooter and a 13-megapixel ultrawide lens — but we don’t suggest getting the 9A, right now at least. Its software support will end a year earlier, and it’s currently more expensive than the 10A ($50 more at most retailers).
The 10A stands out for its slightly brighter screen, faster wired charging, and support for Satellite SOS, among other small differences. It also has two unique AI-powered features from the Pixel 10 series that are not available on the 9A: Camera Coach and Auto Best Take. However, there are no internal hardware differences in the latest version that would prevent the features from coming to last year’s model.
Read our full Pixel 10A review.
Some more Verge-approved deals
Sony’s WF-1000XM6 are back down to around $298 at Amazon and Best Buy, matching their lowest price to date. The wireless, noise-canceling earbuds debuted in mid-February at $329, and they were discounted to this price once before, in the latter half of March. My colleague John Higgins praised their stellar sound,

zh.title: 谷歌Pixel 10A是一款不错的中端手机，现在便宜了50美元
zh.summary: 谷歌Pixel 10A中端手机现已在主要零售商处降价50美元，128GB版本降至449美元。该手机硬件与去年9A相似，但配备相机教练和自动最佳拍摄等独家AI功能。这是自3月上市以来首次大幅折扣。

title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch signals IPO readiness as AI agents fuel revenue surge

The statement reflects accelerating AI adoption in developer-focused infrastructure platforms. Vercel's positioning indicates momentum toward public markets.
content: "The company is ready and getting more ready for every day," Rauch said about an IPO at the HumanX conference.

zh.title: Vercel首席执行官Guillermo Rauch表示IPO在即，AI代理驱动营收增长
zh.summary: Vercel首席执行官Guillermo Rauch表示公司已为IPO做好准备，每天都更加充分，并将AI代理列为营收驱动力。这一声明反映了开发者基础设施平台中AI采用的加速。Vercel的地位表明了向公开市场发展的良好势头。

title: Pragmata is just okay, but it could’ve been great
summary: Capcom's new sci-fi action game Pragmata merges Resident Evil's gameplay style with themes of lunar colonization and artificial intelligence. While the game features genuinely innovative ideas, the execution falls short of its ambitious potential. This represents Capcom's strategic expansion beyond established franchises.
content:
Over the last few years, Capcom has done an exceptional job of solidifying its lineup of big, long-running franchises. The likes of Monster Hunter, Resident Evil, and Street Fighter have all been on strong and consistent runs, an impressive thing given the current strain of uncertainty that runs through the games industry. And now the developer is using that momentum to launch an ambitious new property called Pragmata.
The game takes the bones of Resident Evil's slow-paced action and merges it with a sci-fi world that explores everything from lunar colonization to artificial intelligence. It has some genuinely great ideas, including an incr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Pragmata还不错，但本可以更好
zh.summary: 卡普空的新科幻动作游戏Pragmata融合了《生化危机》的游戏风格与月球殖民和人工智能的主题。虽然游戏拥有真正创新的理念，但执行效果未能达到其雄心勃勃的潜力。这代表卡普空向既有特许经营权之外的战略拓展。

title: Hack at Anodot leaves over a dozen breached companies facing extortion
summary: A breach at Anodot, a platform serving major corporate clients like Rockstar Games, has left over a dozen affected companies facing extortion demands. The incident highlights the vulnerability of SaaS platforms that aggregate data across multiple enterprise customers. This represents a growing threat vector for data aggregation companies.
content: The data breach at Anodot, which affects customers like Rockstar Games, is the latest hack aimed at stealing data from a large number of corporate giants.

zh.title: Anodot黑客事件导致十多家公司遭勒索
zh.summary: Anodot平台遭遇数据泄露，该平台为Rockstar Games等主要企业客户提供服务，导致十多家受影响的公司面临勒索要求。该事件突显了跨多个企业客户汇总数据的SaaS平台的脆弱性。这代表了数据聚合公司面临的日益增长的威胁。

title: Slate Auto raises $650 million as production gets closer and closer
summary: Slate Auto's $650 million funding round brings production launch closer, with the affordable electric pickup truck expected to hit the market in late 2026 at mid-$20,000 pricing. The funding milestone represents significant progress toward commercializing a competitively-priced EV truck. Production is now imminent.
content: The Slate Truck will start in the "mid-$20,000s" when it goes on sale in late 2026.

zh.title: Slate Auto融资6.5亿美元，生产启动日期临近

title: SwitchBot’s button-pressing robot is now available with a rechargeable battery
summary: SwitchBot released a rechargeable version of its popular button-pressing robot, featuring USB-C charging instead of disposable CR2 batteries. The Rechargeable model costs $33.99 compared to $29.99 for the original. The update addresses long-term battery costs and convenience for frequent users.
content:
The SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable’s battery has its own USB-C port for charging. | Image: SwitchBot	

SwitchBot is introducing a new version of the tiny button-pressing robot that helped launch the company a decade ago. The functionality of the new SwitchBot Bot is exactly the same as the original that the company will continue to sell, but comes with a rechargeable battery instead of a disposable one. 
The SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable is available now through the company's online store and Amazon for $33.99, compared to $29.99 for the original version. The original runs on a single 3V CR2 battery, which aren't as common as AAs or even coin cell batteries. While they're available for just a couple of bucks each if you buy a multipack, the Swi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: SwitchBot按钮机器人现已推出可充电版本
zh.summary: SwitchBot发布了其受欢迎的按钮按压机器人的可充电版本，采用USB-C充电代替一次性CR2电池。可充电版本的价格为33.99美元，而原版本为29.99美元。此更新解决了频繁使用者的长期电池成本和便利性问题。

title: Can Puck reinvent the news business for the influencer age?
summary: Puck, a five-year-old media company, combines influencer economics with journalism by hiring prominent reporters, giving them equity and revenue shares. The newsletter-based model produces must-read publications in their categories while offering journalists financial upside typically unavailable in traditional media. Puck represents an experiment bridging creator and journalistic incentives.
content:
Today, I’m talking with Sarah Personette, CEO of Puck, which is a fancy new media company that’s been around for just about five years now.
Puck hires big stars and gives them newsletters that are all mostly part of a subscription bundle. These newsletters are often must-reads in their categories — everyone in Hollywood reads Puck’s Matt Belloni, for instance. Those reporters then get equity in Puck and a share of the company’s revenue.
The idea is to combine the financial incentives of the influencer economy with the rigor of old-school journalism — you’ll hear Sarah say journalists were the original influencers, which is Puck’s catchphrase. Decoder listeners know that I have a lot of questions about that, and how it all fits into the modern media landscape. 



Verge subscribers, don’t forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Decoder wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here. 
The creator and influencer economy works very differently than journalism does. If you take a high-level look at the business of most creators, they all kind of look like little ad agencies, doing brand deals and negotiating rates in a way that has always felt incompatible with journalism, at least to me. I don’t begrudge anyone this reality; that’s where the money is, especially since the big platforms that distribute content tend to pay very little for it, if they pay anything at all. And since the biggest audiences are on the platforms, finding a way to bridge the gap is basically the challenge in media — how do you find new readers who are willing to pay without accidentally giving your work away for free on platforms that don’t seem to value it very much?
I’ve had versions of this conversation with a lot of media people over the years: everyone from the CEO of The New York Times and the publisher of The Wall Street Journal to streaming service executives, digital media folks, and, of course, a bunch of creators. Usually these conversations are p

zh.title: Puck能否为影响力者时代重塑新闻业？
zh.summary: Puck是一家成立五年的媒体公司，通过聘请知名记者并给予他们股权和收入分成，将影响力者经济学与新闻业相结合。这种基于通讯的模式在其类别中产出必读出版物，同时为记者提供传统媒体中通常不可用的财务回报。Puck代表了在内容创作者激励和新闻业激励之间搭建桥梁的试验。

title: Meta spins up AI version of Mark Zuckerberg to engage with employees
summary: Meta is training an AI avatar of Mark Zuckerberg using his image, voice, mannerisms, and public statements for employee interactions. If successful, the company plans to allow creators to build AI avatars of themselves. This reflects Meta's investment in AI personalization and potentially reducing executive time commitments.
content: The Meta chief is personally involved in training and testing his animated AI.

zh.title: Meta推出Mark Zuckerberg的AI版本与员工互动
zh.summary: Meta正在利用Mark Zuckerberg的形象、声音、举止和公开声明训练一个AI化身，用于员工互动。如果成功，公司计划允许创作者构建自己的AI化身。这反映了Meta在AI个性化方面的投资，以及可能减少高管时间承诺的潜力。

title: Mark Zuckerberg is reportedly building an AI clone to replace him in meetings
summary: Mark Zuckerberg is reportedly building an AI clone trained on his likeness and communication style to potentially replace him in meetings. Meta may expand the technology to allow creators to build their own AI avatars if the experiment succeeds. This reflects broader corporate interest in AI personalization and efficiency.
content:
Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg could soon have an AI clone of himself to interact with and provide feedback to employees, according to a report from the Financial Times. Sources tell the outlet that Meta is training the AI avatar on Zuckerberg's image and voice, along with his mannerisms, tone, and public statements, "so that employees might feel more connected to the founder through interactions with it."
Meta may start allowing creators to make AI avatars of themselves if the experiment with Zuckerberg succeeds, according to the Financial Times. In 2024, Meta showed off a live demo of what an AI persona of a creator might look like. It also sta …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Mark Zuckerberg据报道正在构建AI克隆体以在会议中替代他
zh.summary: 据报道，Mark Zuckerberg正在构建一个AI克隆体，根据他的外观和沟通风格进行训练，以可能在会议中替代他。如果实验成功，Meta可能会扩展这项技术，允许创作者构建自己的AI化身。这反映了企业对AI个性化和效率的广泛兴趣。

title: Roblox introduces ‘Kids’ and ‘Select’ accounts for age-appropriate access to games and chat
summary: Roblox is introducing age-appropriate account types with 'Kids' accounts for ages 5-9 and 'Select' accounts for ages 9-15, each with different levels of access and protections. The move reflects the company's response to intense scrutiny over child safety issues and multiple state lawsuits. The tiered approach enables Roblox to provide safer experiences tailored to different age groups on the platform.
content: Users aged five to nine will be assigned to a "Roblox Kids" account, and users aged nine to 15 to will be put in a "Roblox Select" account.

zh.title: Roblox推出"儿童"和"精选"账户，为不同年龄提供适龄游戏和聊天体验
zh.summary: Roblox推出适龄账户类型，其中"儿童"账户面向5-9岁用户，"精选"账户面向9-15岁用户，各具不同的访问级别和保护措施。此举反映了该公司对儿童安全问题和多起州诉讼的回应。这种分级方案使Roblox能够为平台上的不同年龄组提供量身定制的更安全体验。

title: Roblox will need age verification to make sure you’re at least 9 years old
summary: Roblox is implementing age verification requirements for users wanting to access games designed for ages 9 and older as part of its rollout of Kids and Select accounts. The platform has faced intense scrutiny and multiple state lawsuits over child safety concerns, prompting several protective measures. The verification process is among features Roblox has introduced to enhance protections for younger users.
content:
Roblox is about to make a big change to how you can access games on its platform: If you want to play any game that's intended for users nine or older, you will have to complete an age verification process. The shift is happening as part of a rollout of new Roblox Kids and Roblox Select accounts, which have different levels of protections for kids of different age groups.
Roblox has come under intense scrutiny over alleged child safety issues on the platform, and the company is the subject of multiple state lawsuits. The platform has introduced many features to attempt to make the platform a safer place for kids, including locking down sexu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Roblox将实施年龄验证以确保用户至少9岁
zh.summary: 作为儿童和精选账户推出计划的一部分，Roblox正在对希望访问为9岁及以上用户设计的游戏的用户实施年龄验证要求。该平台因儿童安全问题面临严格审查和多起州诉讼，促使公司采取多项保护措施。年龄验证是Roblox为加强对年轻用户保护而推出的功能之一。

title: Roblox has games again
summary: Roblox has reversed its 2021 decision to replace the word 'games' with 'experiences' across its platform, returning to the more intuitive terminology. The company found that 'experiences' confused many parents, players, and developers about what Roblox actually offers. The shift marks a practical acknowledgment that clearer language better serves its user base and reflects the platform's actual function.
content:
Roblox is making a subtle but notable change. After swapping the word "game" for "experience" all over its website and mobile apps in 2021 while the Epic Games v. Apple trial was taking place, Roblox is getting more comfortable with using the term "games" once again.
"Over time, we've learned that 'experiences' isn't an intuitive term for many parents, older players, and game developers," Roblox spokesperson Juliet Chaitin-Lefcourt tells The Verge. "'Games' is clearer and better reflects what Roblox is and where we're going."
One of the Epic v. Apple trial's major points was trying to define what a game is. Roblox sits in a bit of a middle …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Roblox再次使用"游戏"一词
zh.summary: Roblox撤销了2021年的决定，当时曾在整个平台上将"游戏"一词替换为"体验"。该公司发现"体验"一词使许多家长、玩家和开发者对Roblox的实际功能感到困惑。这一转变实际上承认了更清晰的语言能更好地服务其用户群体，并准确反映了平台的真实功能。

title: Did Neuralink make the wrong bet?
summary: Neuralink's brain implant technology faces the challenge of translating ambitious visions of superhuman abilities and mind-AI integration into practical reality. Despite some success with human trials, current products remain limited to brain-to-cursor interfaces for mouse control, far short of Musk's promises. The gap between Musk's claims and scientific progress highlights how hype is colliding with technological constraints.
content:
Elon Musk promised Neuralink would bring superhuman abilities and minds merged with AI. Then he fueled a runaway hype train for his brain implant technology, which ended up with a grisly record for implants in monkeys and some success with human subjects. But for all of the hype, he's still further away than Mars from his goal. And that's because his relentless ambition is once again hitting the wall of scientific reality.
The heart of the issue is how brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) translate thought into results. Neuralink's products have all been brain-to-cursor interfaces, which allow patients to control a mouse with their minds. But N …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Neuralink做了错误的赌注吗？
zh.summary: Neuralink的脑植入技术面临将超人类能力和意识-AI整合的宏大愿景转化为实际现实的挑战。尽管在人体试验中取得了一些成功，但目前的产品仍然局限于脑-光标界面以实现鼠标控制，远未达到马斯克的承诺。马斯克的声称与科学进步之间的差距凸显了炒作与技术限制的碰撞。

title: Microsoft’s new Xbox Gamepad Cursor adds a virtual mouse to handhelds
summary: Microsoft is testing a virtual mouse cursor feature for Windows-based handhelds that converts a gamepad's left stick into a mouse for applications not optimized for controller input. The Gamepad Cursor integrates directly into Windows 11's Xbox mode and can be activated from the Game Bar without third-party software. The feature addresses a practical need for handheld gamers requiring precise cursor control.
content:
Microsoft has started testing its own virtual mouse cursor inside its Xbox mode for Windows-based handhelds. The new Gamepad Cursor option provides a quick way to turn the left stick of a handheld like the Xbox Ally X into a virtual mouse.
While Asus has its own cursor as part of Armory Crate, Microsoft's Gamepad Cursor lives inside its own Xbox mode in Windows 11, and it's easy to activate from the Game Bar without having to use Armory Crate. Once activated, the Gamepad Cursor will turn your left stick into a mouse for precise control, or for apps that aren't designed for controllers.
The left stick will scroll around a screen like a mous …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软新推出的Xbox游戏手柄光标为手持设备添加虚拟鼠标
zh.summary: 微软正在测试一项虚拟鼠标光标功能，为基于Windows的手持设备提供支持，该功能将游戏手柄的左摇杆转换为鼠标，用于未针对控制器输入优化的应用程序。游戏手柄光标直接集成到Windows 11的Xbox模式中，可以从Game Bar激活，无需第三方软件。该功能解决了需要精确光标控制的手持游戏玩家的实际需求。

title: Sam Altman reportedly targeted in second attack
summary: Sam Altman was targeted in a second attack on his Russian Hill home on Sunday morning, with two suspects arrested and charged with negligent discharge following a shooting incident. This follows an earlier Friday attack when a 20-year-old was arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at the same property. Both incidents remain under investigation by San Francisco Police.
content:
Sam Altman was seemingly targeted by a second attack on Sunday morning, with two suspects arrested following a shooting at his Russian Hill residence, The San Francisco Standard reports. The suspects were arrested and charged with negligent discharge, according to a police report on the incident, citing surveillance footage that appears to show a vehicle passenger firing a weapon at Altman's home.
This follows an earlier attack on Friday, in which a 20-year-old man was arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at the same property. The investigations for both incidents are still ongoing.
According to San Francisco Police, offers w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 据报道Sam Altman成为第二次袭击的目标
zh.summary: 周日上午，Sam Altman在其俄罗斯山庄家中遭到第二次袭击，两名嫌疑人因射击事件中的过失伤害被逮捕并指控。这次袭击紧随周五的早期袭击，当时一名20岁的男子因涉嫌向同一处房产投掷汽油弹而被逮捕。两起事件均在旧金山警察局的调查中。

title: Huawei beats Apple and Samsung with new wide foldable
summary: Huawei has unveiled the Pura X Max, a wide-aspect ratio foldable phone launching in China, beating Apple and Samsung to market with this form factor. The device features a passport-like design matching leaked iPhone Fold concepts and includes a triple rear camera system in multiple colors. Full specifications will be announced on April 20th alongside the Pura 90 series.
content:
The Pura X Max’s wide aspect ratio should make it a better option for watching horizontal video. | Image: Huawei	

Apple and Samsung have both been strongly linked with plans for foldable phones in a boxy, wide aspect ratio, but it looks like another company will get there first. Huawei has just revealed the design of the Pura X Max, a new foldable it's launching in China next week, and its passport-esque form factor is a dead ringer for early leaks of the iPhone Fold.
We don't know too much about the Pura X Max yet, which will get a full release on April 20th alongside the colorful Pura 90 series, but early images shared by Huawei show blue, white, orange, and black versions of the phone, all featuring a triple rear camera. The rear design, with gridde …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 华为推出新款宽屏折叠手机，领先苹果和三星
zh.summary: 华为推出Pura X Max，一款宽屏幅比例的折叠手机，将在中国推出，抢先苹果和三星推出这种形式的手机。该设备采用护照式设计，与泄露的iPhone Fold概念相符，配备三摄像头系统，提供多种颜色选择。完整规格将于4月20日与Pura 90系列一起公布。

title: The largest orbital compute cluster is open for business
summary: Kepler Communications has launched the largest orbital compute cluster, deploying 40 GPUs in Earth orbit with Sophia Space as its first customer. The development represents a significant milestone toward practical distributed computing capabilities in space. The orbital infrastructure opens new possibilities for satellite-based computational services and applications.
content: Kepler Communications is flying 40 GPUs in Earth orbit. And its latest customer is Sophia Space.

zh.title: 最大的轨道计算集群已投入运营
zh.summary: Kepler Communications推出了最大的轨道计算集群，在地球轨道上部署了40个GPU，Sophia Space成为其首个客户。这一发展代表了朝着实现空间分布式计算能力的重要里程碑。该轨道基础设施为基于卫星的计算服务和应用开辟了新的可能性。
